emails.body:
Dear Valued Guest,

Marriott Bonvoy is pleased to offer you an exclusive limited-time promotion: earn double points on stays of two nights or more at participating properties worldwide through December 31, 2026.

Book by October 15 using promo code MBV2XPOINTS to qualify. This offer applies to new reservations made at Marriott.com, the Marriott Bonvoy app, or through our reservation center.

Highlights:
• 2x Marriott Bonvoy points on eligible rates
• Valid at 4,000+ hotels globally
• No blackout dates for standard rooms
• Points post within 10 business days of checkout

View participating hotels and book now: [link removed]

Not interested? Unsubscribe here: [link removed]

Marriott Bonvoy Member Services
Marriott International, Inc.
10400 Fernwood Road, Bethesda, MD 20817

This email was sent to james.maddox@jiaitf.example. If you received this in error, please disregard.

Just a quick follow-up — your double points offer expires soon.

We haven't seen a booking come through with your promo code MBV2XPOINTS yet. The October 15 deadline is approaching, and we'd hate for you to miss out on 2x points for your next trip.

Book a qualifying 2+ night stay by October 15, complete it by December 31, and watch the points stack up.

Reserve now: [link removed]

Questions? Reply to this email or call 1-800-MARRIOTT.

— The Marriott Bonvoy Team

Unsubscribe: [link removed]
Marriott International, 10400 Fernwood Road, Bethesda, MD 20817
